---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false
---

![](assets/images/vesikalik.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="300"}

::: {style="text-align: center; margin-top: 10px;"}
[📄 Download CV](files/cv.pdf)
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎓 Education

-   **M.S., Industrial Engineering** — Hacettepe University, Turkey *(2025 – ongoing)*
-   **Erasmus+ Exchange Program** — Montanuniversität Leoben, Austria *(2024)*
-   **B.S., Industrial Engineering** — Balıkesir University, Turkey *(2021 – 2025)*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 💼 Work Experience

### Internships

-   **Engineering Intern** — BEST Transformer A.Ş. *(2025)*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🛠️ Competencies

| Category         | Tools                         |
|------------------|-------------------------------|
| Programming      | R, Python                     |
| Data & Reporting | Quarto, Git, Microsoft Office |
| Simulation       | Rockwell Arena                |
| CAD              | SolidWorks, AutoCAD           |
| ERP              | Oracle ERP                    |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎯 Hobbies

Psychology  ·  Philosophy  ·  Basketball  ·  Violin
